desc.en: Fuzhou Metro is an urban rail transit system serving Fuzhou City, Fujian Province, China. Its first line was put into operation on May 18, 2016, making Fuzhou the 28th city in mainland China and the first city in Fujian Province to open rail transit. Currently, there are six operating lines in total , They are Line 1, Line 2, Line 4, Line 5, Line 6, and Binhai Express respectively， The total mileage has exceeded 200 kilometers
desc.zh-Hans: 福州地铁（Fuzhou Metro）是服务于中国福建省福州市的城市轨道交通系统。其第一条线路于2016年5月18日开通初期运营，使福州市成为中国内地第二十八座、福建省首座开通轨道交通的城市。目前共运营6条线路，分别是1号线，2号线，4号线5号线，6号线和滨海快线，总里程已破200公里。

updateHistory.reason: Added Line 4 and a portion of Line 5 and adjusted some line structure.
Fix positions of station badges and font styles. Also unifying format to Beijing style which is nearer to the official format.
Add Binhai Express and extend line 4
Join the post-pass section of Line 4 which will be opened on December 10, 2025
